dependencyDrafts.prompt: Author the exact first frame for Shot 3 from the selected composition, motion, cast, location, lookbook, and prop references. Elise holds the torn petition at chest height in the market doorway before movement begins.
dependencyDrafts.title: Shot 3 first frame - Elise decides

dependencyDrafts.prompt: Author the exact last frame for Shot 3. Preserve continuity from the first frame while showing Elise half a pace forward with the torn petition raised into the doorway light.
dependencyDrafts.title: Shot 3 last frame - petition raised

finalPromptDraft.prompt: Generate Shot 3 as one cinematic take using the selected first and last frames. Begin with Elise holding the petition; end with the petition raised into the doorway light after one subtle hand-held push-in. Preserve all selected references exactly.
finalPromptDraft.negativePrompt: No text overlays, no new characters, no changed prop design.
finalPromptDraft.title: Shot 3 video take

customPromptNote: Honor the selected first and last frame dependencies. Do not generate without authored dependency drafts and finalPromptDraft.
